Package reciprocal.number.fraction

Class AbstractFraction<N extends Number,T extends AbstractFraction<N,T,Q>,Q extends Number>

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Number
reciprocal.number.fraction.AbstractFraction<N,T,Q>
Type Parameters:
N - Number
T - AbstractFraction
Q - type of quotient of N
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BigFraction, Fraction
@API(status=EXPERIMENTAL, since="0.0.1") public abstract class AbstractFraction<N extends Number,T extends AbstractFraction<N,T,Q>,Q extends Number> extends Number implements Comparable<T>
Base class for fractions
See Also:
